0.text: Calcified soft tissue density with volume loss and structural distortion in the right upper lobe

1.text: Parenchymal fibrosis in the right upper lobe

2.text: Mild bronchiectatic changes in the right upper lobe

3.text: Nodular ground glass opacities in the peripheral subpleural areas of both lungs

4.text: Nodular ground glass opacities in the peribronchovascular areas of both lungs
